problem: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient
hypothesis: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Neuroinflammation. Neuroinflammation reduction via microglial targeting directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
